views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing recent interactions, people met this week, pending follow-ups, and relationship category breakdown. Features a prominent quick-add FAB and stat cards for network growth.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick entry modal optimized for fast logging after a meeting. Person name autocompletes from previous entries. Relationship and context use icon-grid pickers. Connection strength uses a 1-5 star slider. Follow-up toggle reveals conditional note field.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Searchable, filterable log of all interactions grouped by date. Filter by person name, relationship type, or context. Each row shows person, context icon, mood badge, and follow-up indicator. Tap to expand full notes.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Network analytics: weekly interaction trend chart, relationship type pie chart, top contacts leaderboard, meeting context distribution, average connection strength trend, neglected contacts list (people not seen in 30+ days), and monthly networking score.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyInteractionCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of interactions logged in the current week (Mon-Sun)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniquePeopleThisWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of distinct personName values logged this week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalUniquePeople
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of all distinct personName values ever logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one interaction logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: pendingFollowUps
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries where followUpNeeded is true, sorted by date descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: pendingFollowUpCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of entries with followUpNeeded == true

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily interaction counts for the past 8 weeks, used for bar/line chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: relationshipBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of interactions grouped by relationship type for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: contextBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of interactions grouped by meeting context

viewModelComputedProperties.name: topContacts
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 10 most frequently logged people with interaction count and last interaction date

viewModelComputedProperties.name: neglectedContacts
viewModelComputedProperties.description: People not interacted with in 30+ days who have 2+ prior entries, sorted by days since last contact

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageConnectionStrength
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Mean connection strength across all entries this month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of weekly goal met (uniquePeopleThisWeek / weeklyGoal)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Distribution of interaction moods for the past 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: networkGrowthRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: New unique people met this month minus last month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated natural language insights like 'You met 12 new people this month — 40% more than last month' or 'You haven't caught up with Alex in 45 days'

dailyGoal.description: Target number of unique people to interact with per week. Encourages consistent networking and relationship maintenance rather than daily pressure.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least one interaction is logged. Streak resets after a full calendar day with zero entries.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track weekly interaction count vs 4-week rolling average. Flag weeks below 50% of average as 'quiet weeks'. Track new unique people per month vs prior month for network growth rate. Monitor average connection strength trend over 30-day windows.
insights: Network growth: 'You met X new people this month' with comparison to previous month percentage change
Neglected relationships: 'You haven't connected with [name] in [N] days' for anyone with 3+ prior interactions and 30+ days since last
Follow-up reminder: 'You have N pending follow-ups — oldest from [date]'
Top context pattern: 'Most of your connections happen at [context] — try mixing it up' when one context exceeds 50% of monthly interactions
Connection quality: 'Your average connection strength this month is X.X (up/down from last month)'
Relationship balance: 'X% of your interactions are with colleagues — consider nurturing personal connections' when one category exceeds 60%
Streak celebration: 'You've logged interactions for N days in a row — personal best!' when current streak exceeds longest streak
Weekly summary: 'This week: N interactions with N unique people across N different contexts'
